REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS PRONAY SAHA, KAREN SAHA'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A MOTION TO STRIKE IS A PROPER MOTION TO CHALLENGE THE SUFFICIENCY OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1112. NO REPLY FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ANNE CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-14-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PRONAY SAHA, KAREN SAHA'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Elise Czelusniak of Horton Oberrecht Kirkpatrick & Martha (619.232.1183 x235) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

The Court calls Rebecca Coll of Quadra & Coll as there is initially no appearance on behalf of the plaintiffs. Discussed as to notice given to contest the tentative ruling. Defendant requests permission to file a reply, which is denied. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that a motion to strike is a proper motion to challenge the sufficiency of a cause of action. Additionally, Defendants' notice of motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1112. No reply filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Anne Christine Massullo, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/ACM)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Continued To May-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-17-659986 WITH CASE CGC-17-560652
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS BLANCA MARTINEZ AND ENRIQUE ESCALANTE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-17-659986 WITH CASE CGC-17-560652

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR, moot. Action CUD-17-659989 settled on November 20, 2017. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
